sourceMovie.title: The Adam Project
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Adam Project (2022) as a adventure theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The adventure and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Back to the Future
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Adam Project clicked for you, Back to the Future (1985) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and science fiction, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Adam Project?
faq.answer: Try Back to the Future, Back to the Future Part II, Love and Monsters—each shares DNA with The Adam Project while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Adam Project?
faq.answer: The Adam Project (2022) is best described as Adventure, Science Fiction, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Adam Project worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this adventure lane.
